name: @dyndisc/audit-framework-procurement
description: Procurement-specific audit primitives layered on top of @dyndisc/audit-framework-core. Houses the procurement intent block (BuyerIntent/SellerIntent/Scenario), outcome-quality metrics (ZOPA/NBS/IR), and report templates (daily/weekly/forensic).

scripts.build: echo 'No build step — consumed directly as TypeScript via tsx'
